response.justification: Bogdan is a strong Staff-level candidate with highly relevant recent experience in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling. He possesses deep architectural knowledge, a strong craftsmanship mindset, and proven experience with high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby). While he lacks the required Python expertise, his proficiency in TypeScript, deep systems knowledge, and direct exposure to agentic workflows make him an exceptional fit worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct experience developing AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows.
Proven track record designing high-throughput, low-latency microservices capable of handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrates strong technical leadership and ownership through open-source foundation, technical workshops, and software craftsmanship.
concerns: No professional experience listed with Python, which is explicitly stated as a must-have technical skill.
Several recent roles lean heavily toward full-stack and web development, which may dilute his recent focus on backend distributed systems.
History of relatively short tenures (1-3 years) across multiple companies could raise questions about long-term strategic ownership.
